final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original architectural concept illustration for a futuristic floating cityscape, sustainable urban development vision.

Style/medium: futuristic architectural visualization, concept art in the spirit of Syd Mead and Zaha Hadid, clean digital illustration
Composition: wide establishing shot, eye-level to slightly elevated viewpoint, showcasing the floating structure in context
Subject: streamlined white building with organic curves, hovering above ground level, surrounded by autonomous drones and holographic projections
Scene/backdrop: clean sky with soft atmospheric haze, integrated clean energy infrastructure visible, minimalist futuristic urban context
Lighting/mood: soft diffused daylight with subtle rim lighting on the white surfaces, optimistic and forward-looking atmosphere
Color palette: dominant white and light gray architecture, subtle blue accents from holographic elements, clean energy greens as secondary accent
Materials/textures: smooth matte white surfaces with subtle panel lines, transparent holographic overlays, metallic drone finishes
Avoid: dystopian decay, dark stormy weather, cluttered messy composition, 8K stuffer labels, photorealistic rendering style
